tasks.ai_feedback: Tauri 2.0 + Vite scaffolded cleanly. Windows target confirmed. Recommend pinning Rust edition to 2021 for stability.

tasks.description: Set up Tauri + React + Vite architecture
Create fixed sidebar and route shells
Render DAG from agent memory with dagre auto-layout
tasks.ai_feedback: Dagre installed and wired. LR layout enforced with nodesep=60 and ranksep=120. Nodes render without overlaps on complex trees.
In-progress nodes now emit a pulsing glow ring using shadow and animate-ping utilities. Completed nodes visually recede to reduce cognitive load.

tasks.description: Two-way sync: write status changes back to agent_memory.json
tasks.ai_feedback: save_agent_memory Tauri IPC command implemented in lib.rs. Optimistic UI update fires before the async write to avoid perceived latency.

tasks.description: Persist settings, rules and mods across sessions
